supersedes_note: Op 51 pivoted from per-platform TrueCoach adapter to universal auto-discovery importer. Op 50.5 strategic direction (universal live mirror as M-spine) is still valid; the tactical implementation is now the importer extension (auto:<hostname> sourcePlatform) plus a generic /api/scout/import endpoint, NOT the TrueCoach-specific ScoutModule from Op 50.5.

headline_status.current_op: Op 51 — Importer Wave (PR-A merged, PR-B + PR-C1 building in parallel)

immutable_doctrine_in_force.R3_authorship: Every commit shows Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com> as author AND committer. Zero forbidden tokens: claude, anthropic, opus, sonnet, haiku, gemini, openai, gpt, llm, ai-generated, ai-assisted, copilot, co-authored-by, generated by, assisted by, agent, computer, assistant.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R_META_4_forbidden_models: Only claude_opus_4_8 + gpt_5_5 may audit or fix. Sonnet / Haiku / Gemini forbidden.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R11_lens_isolation: Lens A and Lens B run in /tmp/prN_lens<a|b>_<r1|r2>/ with independent clones. No cross-talk.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R72_dual_lens: All P0-P3 PRs require parallel Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.5 adversarial review before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R75_zero_banned_casts: No as any / as unknown as / <any> / @ts-ignore / @ts-nocheck in prod. @ts-expect-error allowed in test doubles only.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R78_single_verdict: Every audit + fixer report ends with exactly one VERDICT line.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R82_reversibility: Every new prisma/migrations/NNNN_/ ships matching down.sql OR '-- IRREVERSIBLE: <reason>' first-line header.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R124_sha_verify_both_ways: gh api head.sha MUST match local git rev-parse HEAD before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R125_defense_in_depth: Every new RLS table validated in tests via cross-tenant boundary check.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R137_postmortem: Every wave closes with a postmortem doc in handoffs/<wave>/postmortem.md.

gotchas: Backend tsc --noEmit + lefthook OOM under 2GB heap; export NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6144.
npm ci postinstall may not complete; manually npx prisma generate.
gh pr edit --add-label / --body-file silently fail on growth-project-backend; use raw gh api PATCH.
pg_dump 16 emits per-invocation \restrict / \unrestrict tokens; dump_normalized() strips them (PR #499).
reset_and_migrate_forward() must DROP both public AND auth schemas + re-run _supabase_bootstrap.sql (PR #498).
Reversibility gate strips ?schema= from DATABASE_URL before psql/pg_dump (PR #497).
